name: <OnAfdxError>
title: <OnAfdxError>
syntax: void <OnAfdxError> ( int64 timestamp, long channel, long errorType, char[] errorText, char[] errorAttributes );
description: This callback is called when an AFDX Error Event is received.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: time stamp of the error event in ns

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: channel number of the error event

parameters.name: errorText
parameters.description: error text of the error event

parameters.name: errorAttributes
parameters.description: error attributes of the error event The attribute string has the following format: DataType;LineHeader;LineData DataType is S: String I: Integer D: Double

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
